name: atlas
//expoHoist: expo is declared at the root (unused by root code) so pnpm hoists it to the workspace-root node_modules, where @expo/metro-config does require.resolve('expo/package.json'). As a single-consumer dep it otherwise stays in apps/mobile/node_modules and `expo start` fails with 'Cannot find module expo/package.json'. Keep the version in sync with apps/mobile. See .npmrc.
